pi_items.source: Abstract persona description, not directly verifiable against task artifacts.
setup_task.sh explicitly creates this namespace and deploys the target workloads to it.
setup_task.sh inline manifest explicitly creates these three deployments.
setup_task.sh writes the specification instructions to this exact file path.
verifier.py sets PASS_THRESHOLD = 75 and requires score >= PASS_THRESHOLD.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated deployments ('public-api', 'report-generator', 'cache-node') deployed to the 'core-system' namespace by setup_task.sh. A specification file detailing the required lifecycle modifications (connection draining for 'public-api', eviction protection for 'report-generator', and extended grace period/manual save hook for 'cache-node') is dynamically generated at '/home/ga/Desktop/lifecycle_spec.md'. The verifier logic strictly enforces a passing threshold of 75 points, confirming that the agent must implement at least 3 out of the 4 specified modifications correctly.
